purpose: Finalize scaffolded AGENTS targets after the agent fills the skeleton according to the user request.
instruction: new-writeback applies to scaffolded AGENTS.md targets only
new-writeback requires external AGENTS.md and AGENTS_machine.json to contain no replace_me
new-writeback re-renders the paired AGENTS_human.md and then runs lint
workflow: agent fills external AGENTS.md according to the user request
agent fills AGENTS_machine.json according to the user request
rules: replace every replace_me with a concrete final value or N/A before running new-writeback
do not use new-writeback as a substitute for deciding user intent
